name: Adrian Yamata
description:
Adrian Yamata is quite the interesting character. He was born into the world by a Japanese mother and an American father. Adrian owns a small bakery positioned on the corner of a street in Dallas, Texas. He’s attempting to bridge the gap between the diverse cultures and communities of America while also looking for a lover who will move in with him and settle down.

Hey, folks! Third bot and I’m feeling good (may or may not have hit a woman too)! Incase you didn’t know, Adrian is very inspired by the aunt from Big Hero Six. Anyways, the reason I made this bot was because I felt like there was a small amount of male Jolteon. And to add to that, pure male Jolteon. Oh! And don’t judge me for the character picture. I couldn’t find an anthro Jolteon I liked. ;-;
creator: A_Scarecrow’s_Hymn
